name: Gazpacho Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Cooked rice (cooled to room temperature)
1 tbsp snipped fresh parsley OR cilantro
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine rice, vegetables, and parsley in a large bowl.
2. In a small bowl, combine vegetable oil, vinegar, garlic, basil, salt, and pepper.
3. Pour the dressing over the rice mixture and toss lightly.
4. Serve on lettuce leaves.
